response.global_analysis: The video consists of a dialogue-driven intro (00:00-00:46) where the characters discuss forming a band, followed by a song performance starting around 01:13. The song title 'Bokura no Let-it-Be' and artist credits were verified via on-screen text. Lyrics were cross-referenced with the provided JSON; since the JSON only contained a snippet, the remaining lyrics were transcribed phonetically and translated contextually. Timestamps are strictly aligned with vocal onset and offset.

subtitles.original: バンドやりたい！ バンドやろうよ！ バンドやる？
subtitles.english: I want to be in a band! Let's do it! A band?

subtitles.original: バンド…あたしマラカス
subtitles.english: Band... I'll play the maracas.

subtitles.original: 練習時間めっちゃかかりそうだけどね
subtitles.english: It'll probably take a lot of practice time, though.

subtitles.original: ドラムやってみたいからな えー？何の？
subtitles.english: Since I want to try the drums. Eh? What's that?

subtitles.original: やるなら練習しますよ
subtitles.english: If we're doing it, I'll practice.

subtitles.original: じゃ、来年やりますバンド 楽しみ！
subtitles.english: Then we'll do the band next year. I'm looking forward to it!

subtitles.original: 本当にやりそうだから怖い 怖い
subtitles.english: It's scary because you seem like you'd really do it. Scary.

subtitles.original: ということで来年楽しみにしてね
subtitles.english: So, please look forward to next year!

subtitles.original: みんな本気にするよ みんな本気にしちゃうよ
subtitles.english: Everyone's going to take you seriously. Everyone's really going to believe it.

subtitles.original: 怖い怖い じゃ来年楽しみということで
subtitles.english: Scary, scary. Well, look forward to next year!

subtitles.original: 本当にみんな見てくれてありがとう これからもまだまだあるので
subtitles.english: Really, thank you everyone for watching. There's still more to come after this,

subtitles.original: 楽しんでください 楽しんでね
subtitles.english: so please enjoy it! Enjoy, okay?

subtitles.original: おめでとう！ ありがとう！
subtitles.english: Congratulations! Thank you!

subtitles.original: ぼくらのレットイットビー
subtitles.english: Bokura no Let-it-Be

subtitles.original: Lyrics, Music: 計測器 (HarryP)
subtitles.english: Lyrics, Music: Keisokuki (HarryP)

subtitles.original: 生まれ変われるのなら
subtitles.english: If I could be reborn,

subtitles.original: 目印になるから 巻いておこう
subtitles.english: I'll wrap it around as a sign.

subtitles.original: 小指と小指の長い糸
subtitles.english: The long thread between our pinkies...

subtitles.original: ほどけない様に 結んどこう
subtitles.english: ...let's tie it so it won't come undone.

subtitles.original: 夏祭り 陽炎 雨降り
subtitles.english: Summer festival, heat haze, rainfall.

subtitles.original: 空に虹がかかる頃なのかな
subtitles.english: Is it around the time a rainbow appears in the sky?

subtitles.original: 壊れた感情じゃ いつか君を消して行く
subtitles.english: With broken emotions, someday they'll erase you.

subtitles.original: 見えなくなると失われる灯火
subtitles.english: A light that is lost when it becomes invisible.

subtitles.original: でも結んだ長い糸 ほどけ落ちていないから
subtitles.english: But the long thread we tied hasn't come undone,

subtitles.original: また僕たちは出会う時が来る きっと
subtitles.english: so we will surely meet again one day.

subtitles.original: 僕ら大人になったら
subtitles.english: When we become adults,

subtitles.original: 正義のヒーローになるんだ
subtitles.english: we'll become heroes of justice.

subtitles.original: 地球の平和を守るのさ
subtitles.english: We'll protect the peace of the Earth.

subtitles.original: 探検しようぜ お化け屋敷
subtitles.english: Let's explore a haunted house.

subtitles.original: でも本当は怖くて泣き虫
subtitles.english: But the truth is, I'm a scaredy-cat and a crybaby,

subtitles.original: 一緒にいたいだけ
subtitles.english: I just want to be with you.

subtitles.original: 明日も晴れて 空を仰いで照らせば
subtitles.english: If it's sunny tomorrow too, and we look up and shine upon the sky,

subtitles.original: 僕らはここに秘密基地を作ろう
subtitles.english: let's make a secret base here.

subtitles.original: そして探検しよう 雨ならゲームしよう
subtitles.english: And then let's explore, or if it rains, let's play games.

subtitles.original: そんな時間が ずっと続くはずだったんだ そう
subtitles.english: That time was supposed to last forever, yeah.

subtitles.original: 悪者は僕だった
subtitles.english: The bad guy was me.

subtitles.original: 逃げたのは僕だった
subtitles.english: The one who ran away was me.

subtitles.original: 嘘じゃない本当の嘘つきだ
subtitles.english: It's not a lie, I'm a real liar.

subtitles.original: 花束に包まれて 目を瞑る君は
subtitles.english: Wrapped in a bouquet, you with your eyes closed,

subtitles.original: 安らかに 清らかに
subtitles.english: are peacefully, purely

subtitles.original: 眠っていたんだ
subtitles.english: sleeping.

subtitles.original: 壊れた感情が いつか君を消して行こう
subtitles.english: Broken emotions will someday erase you.

subtitles.original: 失う前に 消えてしまう前に
subtitles.english: Before you're lost, before you disappear,

subtitles.original: ただ結んだ長い糸 ほどけ落ちていなかった
subtitles.english: the long thread we tied just hadn't come undone.

subtitles.original: きっと僕たちは 出会う時が来る
subtitles.english: Surely the time will come when we meet.
